orchestrator.identified_role: desktop-auth/gameSSO setup routine that seeds the cached config block used by later shield/oauth and game-session requests

key_observations: This is the only concrete seeding callsite found for the 0x140E58B08..0x140E58B80 cache block.
Passes six string-like inputs that are later copied into the six global slots in a fixed order.
At this callsite the third cached string slot is seeded from an explicitly empty stack-local string, so the redirTo-like field starts blank on this branch.

auth_header_builder.identified_role: formats the Authorization header value from the first two cached config strings
key_observations: Formats an intermediate credential string with the literal '%s:%s' at 0x140B7BCF4 using the first two cached strings.
Wraps the encoded credential with the literal 'Basic' at 0x140B5DD60 using the literal '%s %s' at 0x140B74914.
The resulting string is stored into the temporary destination later attached under the Authorization header name.
auth_header_builder.conclusion: The first two cached config strings are the two Basic-auth credential components used across the shield/oauth and game-session request builders.

cached_slot_mapping.identified_role: desktop-auth OAuth client id or username-like Basic-auth component
supporting_observations: 0x14029C430 uses this slot as the first half of a '%s:%s' credential pair.
The seeding local is initialized directly from the literal com_jagex_auth_desktop_rs before the snapshot call.

cached_slot_mapping.identified_role: second Basic-auth credential component paired with the desktop client id
supporting_observations: 0x14029C430 uses this slot as the second half of the '%s:%s' credential pair before adding the Basic prefix.
The current seeding path writes the literal public into this local immediately before the snapshot call.
cached_slot_mapping.notes: The value behaves like a public-client credential marker rather than a hidden secret on this path.

supporting_observations: 0x14029A0D0 pairs this slot with the literal scope field name while building shield/oauth/token.
The seeding local is initialized directly from the gamesso.token.create literal before the snapshot call.
0x14029A0D0 pairs this slot with the literal redirTo field name.
The local passed into this slot is initialized to empty and is not populated before the snapshot call in the observed desktop-auth path.
cached_slot_mapping.notes: This slot remains structurally important even though the current branch seeds it as blank.

supporting_observations: 0x14029A0D0 and 0x14029A3D0 pass this slot into 0x140183CE0 when composing shield/oauth/token and shield/oauth/check_token.
The same root is also reused by the revoke builder family.
0x14029AD20 passes this slot into 0x140183CE0 when composing game-session/v1/tokens.
This slot is distinct from the shield/oauth root at 0x140E58B68.

shield_oauth_family.summary: Uses the Basic-auth credential pair, the gamesso.token.create scope string, the redirTo-like slot, and the OAuth root while refreshing token state.
Reuses the same Basic-auth credential pair and OAuth root for shield/oauth/check_token.

game_session_family.summary: Reuses the same Basic-auth credential pair but switches to the separate game-session base root.

updated_conclusion: The earlier 0x140E58B08..0x140E58B80 cache block is now identified as a desktop-auth configuration bundle: Basic-auth client credentials, a gamesso.token.create scope string, an optional redirTo field, and two distinct base roots for shield/oauth versus game-session services.
next_targets: Name the upstream producers of client +0x19D88 and client +0x19E30 so the OAuth and game-session base roots can be tied to concrete config/bootstrap sources.
Determine whether any alternate path seeds 0x140E58B50 with a non-empty redirTo string.
Reconcile the earlier continuation quartet grant_type/token/redirTo/sig with this later config cache to prove exactly where the handoff between the two stages occurs.
